headline: A Look At PPG Industries (PPG) Valuation After Q1 Beat And Coatings Expansion
summary: PPG Industries (PPG) has drawn fresh attention after better than expected first quarter results, continued progress toward its 2030 sustainability goals, and new coatings launches across EMEA and Mexico, which supported investor interest. See our latest analysis for PPG Industries. The recent Q1 beat and product launches in EMEA and Mexico have helped the stock regain some traction, with a 7 day share price return of 5.01% and year to date share price return of 3.29%.
